item.title: George J Howe Company, Inc.: 25# Sunflower Seeds C/S Recall
item.summary: The firm is recalling sunflower seed products due to the presence of an undeclared tree nut allergen, cashew. Product details: 25# Sunflower Seeds C/S
item.affectedPeople: The recalled product was distributed to the following States: AL, AR, FL, GA, IA, IL, IN, KS, KY, MD, MI, MN, MO, MS, NC, NJ, NY, OH, OK, PA, SC, TN, VA,WI,WV,
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
